form.formComment: Can settle forward and he showed improvement to place in his last two runs including finished 3rd over 350m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (20.44) behind Fighting Fair in a Mix on April 12. Finished 3rd in a Mix on April 12 over 350m at this track behind Fighting Fair beaten 5.5 lengths (20.44). Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

form.formComment: At the last start finished last over 450m at this track beaten 11 lengths (26.16) behind Mr. Einstein in a Grade 5 on April 12. With a good start will take catching off the low draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together rounding the home turn and fell as a result.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (25.97) over 450m at this track. Has a squeeze box to navigate but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 5 for the first time after finishing a 4 length fourth at Q Lakeside (25.85) in a Grade 6. Looks a place chance at best.
